event_title: Jason Swartz, Everyone's guide to event-sourcing and async messaging for micros
title: Jason Swartz, Everyone's guide to event-sourcing and async messaging for micros
description: Title Jason Swartz, Everyone's guide to event-sourcing and async messaging for microservices Abstract We're hitting all the buzzwords! In this talk we'll look at why & how to use event-sourcing to introduce immutability to your regular db's tables. We'll also discuss asynchronous, non-blocking microservices and examine some of the more straightforward solutions for building them. If you're looking for a complex architecture guide, this ain't it. It's microservice event-sourcing and async message for the 99%. Bio Jason Swartz is the author of "Learning Scala" from O'Reilly Media and a Software Engineer in the San Francisco Bay Area. He has developed Scala applications at Netflix and Mesosphere and is currently learning to live sweaty at ClassPass. Schedule • 6:30-7:00 - networking • 7:00-7:10 - announcements etc • 7:10-~8:40 - talk • 8:40-9:00 - networking
